title: Happy Homewares Modern Designer Black Mushroom Designer Table Lamp with Satin Gold Inner Shade and Soft Fabric Cable | 25cm x 18cm | Fully Adjustable Domed Shade
features: Modern and unique mushroom style table lamp with mat black domed shade and rectangular weighted base. The shade is fully adjustable and can be tilted allowing as much light out as desired.
Includes unique satin gold metallic finish on the inside of the mushroom shade creating an eye-catching effect when light reflects against it.
Product dimensions are as follows: Height - 25cm, Shade diameter - 18cm.
Requires 1 x 40watt maximum SES (E14) golf ball light bulb - not included. Light bulb in images is for illustration purposes only.
Features black inline on/off switch and matching luxurious soft fabric cable with soft felt protective cover on the bottom of the base.
